name: Mixtour
author: Abstract Games factory (game by Dieter Stein, 2011)
description: Mixtour (Dieter Stein, 2011): a pure stacking game on an empty 5x5 board. Enter a piece or move any stack's top pieces in a straight line onto another stack -- the move's distance must exactly equal the TARGET stack's height. Build a stack of five or more with your colour on top to win. You may move your opponent's pieces, but you may never take their last move straight back.
